response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience building geospatial data platforms and high-performance distributed systems, demonstrating strong domain alignment with the routing tiling role. However, his recent technical stack leans heavily towards TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his C/C++ experience being nearly a decade old and no Rust experience listed. He is a strong engineer with relevant GIS background, but would require ramp-up time for the primary required languages (Modern C++ or Rust).
strengths: Strong domain experience in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (Founder of GISCollective).
Proven ability to build and scale low-latency, high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and automated testing frameworks.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with Modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary languages required for the role.
Most recent roles focus predominantly on full-stack web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than low-level systems engineering.
Specific experience with routing algorithms and real-time traffic signal integration is not explicitly detailed.
